description: CryptoLuck Games (CryptoLuck) is the native token of the next-generation digital gaming and luck-based entertainment platform, CryptoLuck.Games. Launched on AtlantisChain - the world's ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time – CryptoLuck is exclusively used for payments and rewards across the platform, which delivers provably fair games, instant finality, and AI-enabled smart contracts, connecting players, crypto traders, and web3 users worldwide.
name: CryptoLuck Games
